description: My Harbor Candle order #HC-10428 shows delivered, but the box never arrived. Can you check the tracking and let me know the next step?
subject: Order marked delivered but not received

description: The Cedar and Sage candle I received has a cracked vessel. The wax is intact but the glass is chipped along the rim. Order #HC-10511.
subject: Damaged vessel on arrival

description: Can the Winter Hearth set be gift wrapped and sent directly to my sister with a note? Happy to pay any wrapping fee.
subject: Gift wrap and direct shipping request

description: Do you restock the Sea Salt and Driftwood scent? It has been sold out since last month and I would love two for the holidays.
subject: Restock timing for Sea Salt and Driftwood

description: I ordered the three-wick Amber Woods but received the single-wick version. Order #HC-10892. Can we sort out a swap?
subject: Wrong product variant shipped

description: The discount code HOLIDAY15 did not apply at checkout. I went ahead and paid full price on order #HC-10977. Is a partial refund possible?
subject: Promo code did not apply at checkout

description: Are the wicks in the Linen and Lavender line cotton or wood? I am sensitive to soot and want to confirm before reordering.
subject: Wick material question

description: I would like to set up a recurring quarterly order of the Cedar and Sage three-wick. Is a subscription available?
subject: Subscription order request

description: My package arrived but one of the two candles was missing from the box. Order #HC-11240 only had the Amber Woods, not the Sea Salt.
subject: Missing item from order

description: Requesting a return on order #HC-11388. The scent is lovely but stronger than I expected. What is your return window?
subject: Return policy and request

description: I run a small boutique and would like to carry your candles. Can you share wholesale pricing and minimum order quantities?
subject: Wholesale inquiry

description: We are sourcing branded candles for a retail gifting campaign. Do you offer custom labels and bulk lead times? Looping in our brand designer.
subject: Custom label and bulk order inquiry

description: The autumn collection link in your latest email returns a 404. I wanted to browse the new scents before they sell out.
subject: Broken link in newsletter

description: My order confirmation email never came through after checkout on #HC-11602. The charge posted to my card. Can you confirm the order is in?
subject: No order confirmation received
